plugin.name: Code Factory
plugin.description: Preview, apply, and undo grouped code cleanup, comment stripping, safe-to-share masking, and pack operations across a project folder.
title: Code Factory
description: Preview, apply, and undo grouped code cleanup, comment stripping, safe-to-share masking, and pack operations across a project folder.
path.placeholder: Select or drop a project folder...
options.intro: Choose exactly which operations to preview or apply. Riskier pack options stay off by default.
group.cleanup.title: Cleanup
group.cleanup.desc: Whitespace, indentation, EOF newline, and line ending normalization.
group.comments.title: Comments
group.comments.desc: Grammar-aware comment cleanup for supported file types only.
group.sanitize.title: Safe-to-Share
group.sanitize.desc: Mask secrets and scrub local paths or IP addresses before sharing code.
group.pack.title: Pack
group.pack.desc: More aggressive vertical-space and size reduction for supported formats.
group.pack.note: Pack options are intentionally off by default because they are the most behavior-sensitive operations.
option.trim.label: Trim trailing whitespace
option.trim.desc: Remove spaces and tabs at the end of lines.
option.blank.label: Compress repeated blank lines
option.blank.desc: Keep only one blank line inside each empty-line run.
option.indent.label: Indentation
option.eof.label: Ensure exactly one newline at end of file
option.eof.desc: Normalize the file to end with a single trailing newline.
option.eol.label: Line endings
option.todo.label: Remove TODO and FIXME comment lines
option.todo.desc: Delete comment-only lines that contain TODO or FIXME markers.
option.block.label: Strip block comments
option.block.desc: Remove multi-line comment blocks for supported syntaxes.
option.line.label: Strip line comments
option.line.desc: Remove inline and whole-line comments for supported syntaxes.
option.mask.label: Mask sensitive strings
option.mask.desc: Replace obvious tokens, secrets, and password-like assignments with redacted values.
option.paths.label: Neutralize absolute paths
option.paths.desc: Replace local absolute paths with a generic placeholder.
option.ips.label: Scrub IPv4 and IPv6 addresses
option.ips.desc: Mask hard-coded IP addresses before sharing the code.
option.brace.label: Move opening braces onto the previous line
option.brace.desc: Collapse lone opening-brace lines into the statement above them.
option.minify.label: Full minify into a compact single-line result
option.minify.desc: Use a conservative format-specific minify pass on supported file types.
details.placeholder: Select a result row to inspect the before/after preview and file metadata.
details.empty: Select a result row to inspect its details.
details.clean: No matching changes were generated for the selected folder and operations.
summary.ready: Choose a project folder and preview the operations you want to run.
summary.metrics: Scanned {scanned} files ({text} text). Changed {changed} files, listed {rows} result rows, and skipped {skipped} files where needed. Line endings detected: LF {lf}, CRLF {crlf}, Mixed {mixed}. {undo}
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
dialog.missing.ops: Select at least one operation to preview or apply.
dialog.preview.title: Preview Required
dialog.preview.body: Run Preview Changes first so the apply step uses the latest folder and options.
dialog.apply.title: Apply Changes
dialog.apply.body: Apply the previewed Code Factory changes to the original files?
dialog.undo.title: Undo Last Run
dialog.undo.body: Restore the most recent Code Factory apply session?
dialog.undo.none: No undo snapshot is currently available.
run.preview.none: Preview completed with no editable changes.
run.apply: Applied Code Factory changes to {count} files.
run.undo: Restored {count} files from the last Code Factory snapshot.
error.no_files: No files were found in the selected folder.
error.minify.invalid: Full minify could not parse this file safely.
error.undo.read: Undo snapshot could not be read: {error}
change.todo: Removed a TODO or FIXME comment line.
change.brace: Moved an opening brace onto the previous line.
change.minify: Minified the file into a compact form.
change.eof: Normalized the file to end with exactly one newline.
skip.binary: Skipped a binary or non-text file.
skip.todo.unsupported: TODO purge is not available for this file type.
skip.block.unsupported: Block comment stripping is not available for this file type.
skip.line.unsupported: Line comment stripping is not available for this file type.
skip.brace.unsupported: Brace internalizer is not available for this file type.
skip.minify.unsupported: Full minify is not available for this file type.
log.preview.start: Scanning {count} files for Code Factory preview...
log.preview.done: Previewed {rows} result rows across {files} changed files.
log.apply.done: Applied Code Factory changes to {count} files.
